title: capnoides angustifolia
intro: Capnoides angustifolia, also known as the Mexican tea tree, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial agent. It is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, offering benefits like reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and promoting digestion. Capnoides angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
